title: Assertion fault on SQL input (2)
poc: CREATE  TEMP  TABLE t1(rootpage PRIMARY  KEY  ON  CONFLICT  IGNORE ) WITHOUT  ROWID ;
CREATE  TEMP  TRIGGER trig0 DELETE  ON t1 FOR  EACH  ROW  BEGIN  SELECT t2.* FROM (temp.t1 NOT  INDEXED ), (t1 AS t2 NOT  INDEXED , t1 AS t1 NOT  INDEXED ) GROUP  BY  NULL ,  FALSE ;

END ;
CREATE  TRIGGER  IF  NOT  EXISTS temp.trig0 INSTEAD  OF  DELETE  ON t1 FOR  EACH  ROW  WHEN 0.0 BEGIN  INSERT  OR  FAIL  INTO t1 VALUES (0.0) ON  CONFLICT  DO  NOTHING  RETURNING *;
FAIL  INTO t1 VALUES (0.0) ON  CONFLICT  DO  NOTHING  RETURNING *;
key_bug_features: Assertion fault on DELETE trigger with conflicting inserts
bug_features_seed: CREATE TEMP TABLE fuzz_t1(rootpage PRIMARY KEY ON CONFLICT IGNORE) WITHOUT ROWID;
CREATE TEMP TRIGGER fuzz_trig_del DELETE ON fuzz_t1 FOR EACH ROW BEGIN SELECT t2.* FROM (temp.fuzz_t1 NOT INDEXED), (fuzz_t1 AS t2 NOT INDEXED, fuzz_t1 AS t1 NOT INDEXED) GROUP BY NULL, FALSE; END;
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS temp.fuzz_trig_io INSTEAD OF DELETE ON fuzz_t1 FOR EACH ROW WHEN 0.0 BEGIN INSERT OR FAIL INTO fuzz_t1 VALUES (0.0) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING *; END;
INSERT OR FAIL INTO fuzz_t1 VALUES (0.0) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING *;
